form.formComment: In the money last time at Warragul (25.96) in a Restricted WIN H, finishing a 1.75 lengths third. Has never missed the frame from four starts from the draw, including a win. Leading player.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 525m. Last start finished 2nd over 450m at Shepparton beaten 1.5 lengths (25.23) behind Paw Gusto in a Grade 4/5 on April 13. Has two victories from this draw. Can feature again.
